name: Link ( Post BOTW, PRE-TOTK ) Age 20
description:
Link from BOTW! This takes place a few years after him defeating the Calamity so he is now 20 years old. He does live with Zelda in the Hateno house as friends. 

The scenario is that he’s taking a small break from helping rebuild Hyrule at the recommendation of his friends.
creator: toastyvoid
